top.title: Israeli settlers target Palestinian villages in occupied West Bank, attacking people and properties
top.summary: The violence began after 18-year-old settler Yehuda Sherman was killed after reportedly being hit by a vehicle driven by a Palestinian while on his quad bike.

top.title: Israel to expand ground and air attacks against Hezbollah in Lebanon
top.summary: There are fears in Lebanon that Israel is preparing for a large-scale ground invasion.

top.title: France's Socialists hold onto power in major cities in election boost for mainstream
top.summary: Paris and Marseille are held by the Socialists in local elections which saw the nationalist right win in Nice and certain towns.

top.title: AI videos of sexualised black women removed from TikTok after BBC investigation
top.summary: Dozens of Instagram and TikTok accounts have used AI avatars to promote explicit content, the BBC finds.

top.title: Luke Littler applies to trademark his face to combat AI fakes
top.summary: The darts star's image has been used legally on darts merchandise, snacks and fashion brands.

top.title: Hargreaves Lansdown says IT issues which affected thousands are over
top.summary: The finance firm has apologised for the disruption to its website and app, which has angered many customers.

title.#text: AI influencer awards season is upon us
Topical Dancer is propulsive, playful, and political
Crimson Desert dev apologizes for use of AI art
